SEARCH
Package com.nib.commons

Interface IEnvironment

All Known Implementing Classes:
Environment
public interface IEnvironment
The IEnvironment interface provides a generic environment for N.I.B. It provides methods to handle system input/output, logging, file definitions, and job details.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    IFileDefinitionHandler
    getFileDefinitionHandler()
    Get the file definition handler.
    String
    getJobname()
    Get the job name.
    long
    getJobnum()
    Get the job number.
    String[]
    getLoadLibPath()
    Get the load library path.
    org.slf4j.Logger
    getLogger()
    Get the logger.
    ISysIn
    getSysin()
    Get the system input handler.
    ISysLog
    getSyslog()
    Get the system log handler.
    ISysOut
    getSysout()
    Get the system output handler.
    DateTime
    now()
    return the current date and time

  • Method Details

    • getLoadLibPath

      String[] getLoadLibPath()
      Get the load library path.
      Returns:
      An array of Strings representing the load library paths.

      Get the logger.
      Returns:

    • getFileDefinitionHandler

      Get the system output handler.
      Returns:

      Returns:

    • getJobname

      String getJobname()
      Get the job name.
      Returns:
      A String representing the job name.

    • getJobnum

      long getJobnum()
      Get the job number.
      Returns:
      A long representing the job number.

      DateTime now()
      return the current date and time
